The function should process a list of musical notes and check if each note falls within the specified vocal range. It will convert the note strings into numerical values to determine if they are within the lower and upper bounds. The function will iterate through each note, convert it to a numerical value, and compare it against the range. If all notes are within the range, the function returns `True`; otherwise, it returns `False`.
